abilities.description: You draw a card and you lose 1 life. Proliferate.
Target creature becomes a Treasure artifact with "{T}, Sacrifice this artifact: Add one mana of any color" and loses all other card types and abilities.
If target player has fewer than nine poison counters, they get a number of poison counters equal to the difference.

effect.description: If target player has fewer than nine poison counters, they get a number of poison counters equal to the difference.
effect.name: Poison
